/CAL: ARRIAGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 07-01-22 10TH/X: COURT ESTABLLISHES 60TH DAY A 08-16-22/ACM/X: DEFENDANT MUST REPORT TO ACM 3 TIMES A WEEK IN PERSON OR BY PHONE, MUST REPORT TO APD WITHIN 24HRS OFRELEASE, MUST PARTICIPATE OM COUNSELING TBD BY ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS ATTHAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1: EDGAR HIGGINS/SA2: 2363 BRYANT ST SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: STATUS OF ACM COMPLIANCE/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMANRY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1HR/
